sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n113255" key="xamaili/banos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χᾰμαι-λίβᾰνος</orth> <pron extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="pron">[ῐ]</pron>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, a kind of <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">λίβανος,</foreign> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0718.tlg001:129" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aët.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.129</biblScope></bibl>.</entryFree>
